title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules that Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei use to decide what is worth building with Claude. The video aims to help builders and entrepreneurs avoid building the wrong products by applying these decision-making principles to side projects, businesses, and job optimization.
